chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 344 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.1383/2021. 2. For hearing of main case. 15.01.2025 Mr. Taimoor Ahmad Qureshi, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. M. Asadullah Sheikh, advocate for the respondents 3 & 4. Ms. Sara Malkani, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel, the subject matter herein is a show cause notice and the petitioner shall respond to the same before the issuing authority. Learned counsel states that the petition may be disposed of in the terms that the respondents may adjudicate the show cause notice vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. In the interim period, no further coercive action may be taken against the petitioner. Respondents counsel has no cavil to the aforesaid proposition. Petition is disposed of as aforesaid. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
